name: Electronic Gourmet's Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the steak into 1-inch cubes. Heat the oil and cook the beef a few cubes at a time, turning to brown on all sides.
2. Add the chopped onions and sauté over medium heat for 2 or 3 minutes. Then add the garlic.
3. Season with salt to taste. Add the boiling water, caraway seeds, sesame seeds, and oregano. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
4. Gradually stir in the chili powder, testing frequently until you achieve the desired level of flavor and heat. Add olives, cover, and simmer for another hour.
5. Taste and correct the seasoning. Mix in the kidney beans and heat through.
Toast french bread, tortillas, or cornbread pair well with this dish and a crisp green salad.
Hints: Beer is the only drink that can stand up to the spiciness of the chili. Cool and freeze in containers. Serve on day at low heat.
